steps.title: Contrast the evidence types
steps.content: Text 1 describes researchers who use computer models to argue that plate movement began about 3 billion years ago. Text 2 says claims about tectonic movement must rest on empirical geological evidence, then cites zircon chemistry suggesting movement as early as 4.2 billion years ago.

steps.title: Reject model-focused responses
steps.content: Choice A challenges mantle temperature, which Text 2 does not do. Choice B and Choice C focus on comparing or improving computer models, but Text 2 favors geological evidence over models. The option about more definitive evidence producing a different timeline matches this response. The answer is D.
